title: AAQ Helm Chart Values
description: Configuration values for the Applications Aware Quota (AAQ) Helm chart.

global.title: Global Configuration
global.description: Global settings shared across all subcharts.

imageRegistry.title: Image Registry
imageRegistry.description: Global container image registry override. When set, all images will be pulled from this registry.

imagePullSecrets.title: Image Pull Secrets
imagePullSecrets.description: Global list of image pull secrets for authenticating to private registries.

nodeSelector.title: Node Selector
nodeSelector.description: Global node selector applied to all pods.

tolerations.title: Tolerations
tolerations.description: Global tolerations applied to all pods.

kubevirtNamespace.title: KubeVirt Namespace
kubevirtNamespace.description: Global KubeVirt namespace. Used by subcharts that deploy into the KubeVirt namespace.

namespace.title: Namespace
namespace.description: Kubernetes namespace where AAQ components will be deployed.

operator.title: Operator Configuration
operator.description: Configuration for the AAQ operator deployment.

image.title: Image
image.description: Container image settings for the AAQ operator.

repository.title: Repository
repository.description: Container image repository for the AAQ operator.

replicas.title: Replicas
replicas.description: Number of AAQ operator pod replicas.

resources.title: Resource Requirements
resources.description: CPU and memory resource requests and limits.

limits.title: Resource Limits
limits.description: Maximum resources the container can use.

nodeSelector.title: Node Selector
nodeSelector.description: Node selector for scheduling the AAQ operator pods.

tolerations.title: Tolerations
tolerations.description: Tolerations for the AAQ operator pods.

cr.title: Custom Resource Configuration
cr.description: Configuration for the AAQ custom resource instance.

imagePullPolicy.title: Image Pull Policy
imagePullPolicy.description: Image pull policy for AAQ workload pods managed by the operator.

infra.title: Infrastructure Placement
infra.description: Placement configuration for AAQ infrastructure components.

nodeSelector.title: Node Selector
nodeSelector.description: Node selector for AAQ infrastructure pods.

workload.title: Workload Placement
workload.description: Placement configuration for AAQ workload components.

nodeSelector.title: Node Selector
nodeSelector.description: Node selector for AAQ workload pods.

enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: Whether this component is enabled. Controlled by the parent chart.
